genesis.note: The canonical FEATURE-LOCKED text-to-image prompt (v2 — tuned against the master reference: green-hazel hooded eyes, fuller cheeks and rounded chin, darker roots, curvy hourglass build, lily below the navel, black cord bracelet). Prompt detail collapses most of the variance; for a pixel-exact, same-every-time result, also use a fixed seed, the master reference (face-swap), or the LoRA. compact_prompt_500 fits a2e's 500-character cap.
genesis.use_on: Flux, SDXL, Midjourney, or any capable text-to-image model. Note: a2e text-to-image caps prompts at 500 characters — trim if generating there.
genesis.prompt: Ultra-photorealistic full-body studio portrait of a stunning 25-year-old woman with soft, natural facial features. Long oval face with fuller cheeks and a softly rounded chin; medium, slightly hooded green-hazel eyes with smoky winged eyeliner; arched auburn-brown eyebrows; straight medium nose; natural medium-full lips with a soft cupid's bow, glossy rose-pink, closed in a relaxed knowing smirk. Deep copper-red hair with darker auburn roots, side-parted, falling in long glossy defined loose curls past her chest. Warm, lightly tanned fair skin with realistic pores and faint freckles. Curvy hourglass figure with a full natural bust, narrow waist, softly toned stomach, wide hips and full thighs. A small orange-red lily tattoo with dark outlines centered low on her abdomen, just below the navel. Her only jewelry is a thin black cord bracelet; glossy red-pink nails. Direct, confident gaze straight into the camera. Black lace push-up bra and lace thong, sheer black lace-top thigh-high stockings, plain white seamless backdrop, soft even studio lighting, hyper-detailed skin and hair, sharp focus, 8k, photorealistic.
genesis.original_short_prompt: AI character with vibrant red curly hair, wearing black lace lingerie set including a push-up bra and thong, with matching lace garters on thighs, standing against a plain white background, soft studio lighting, realistic skin texture, detailed facial features, direct gaze, full-body shot, high-resolution, 8k — the original lucky prompt that first generated her, kept for provenance
genesis.prompt_v1: Ultra-photorealistic full-body studio portrait of a beautiful 25-year-old synthetic woman. Long, voluminous, vibrant fiery copper-red hair in loose natural curls, side-parted with soft face-framing layers cascading past her chest. Oval face with high, soft cheekbones and a delicate jawline; fair, warm, lightly sun-kissed skin with realistic pores and faint freckles across the nose. Large, almond-shaped green eyes, slightly wide-set, with long dark lashes and well-defined auburn eyebrows. Straight, refined nose with a subtly upturned tip. Full lips with a sharp cupid's bow and a natural rosy-nude tint, in a relaxed, confident half-smile. Slim, athletic hourglass figure with a narrow waist and an even golden tan. A small, delicate lily tattoo low on her abdomen. Direct, knowing gaze straight into the camera. Black lace lingerie set, plain white seamless backdrop, soft even studio lighting, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed skin and hair, sharp focus, 8k, photorealistic.
genesis.compact_prompt_500: Photorealistic full-body studio photo, 25-year-old woman: long oval face, fuller cheeks, rounded chin, hooded green-hazel eyes, smoky liner, arched auburn brows, straight nose, glossy rose-pink lips, knowing smirk. Copper-red hair, darker roots, long glossy loose curls. Curvy hourglass figure, full bust, narrow waist, wide hips. Small orange lily tattoo below the navel; thin black cord bracelet; red-pink nails. Black lace lingerie, stockings, white backdrop, soft studio light, 8k.

scene_recipe.note: To place her in any scene while holding her identity, head-swap the master reference onto a generated body using this style prefix, then append your scene.
scene_recipe.style_prefix: Candid photo of the woman in the reference photo, keeping her exact face, hair, and outfit,
scene_recipe.example_scene: as a heroic Jedi in layered brown robes igniting a glowing blue lightsaber in a torch-lit stone temple, cinematic, face clearly visible
